s1.ptxt: Make marks (1) as shown in figure with wiper motor (2) stopped.

Connect battery positive (+) and negative (–) terminals to rear wiper motor connector terminals as shown to operate rear motor at low speed. If rear wiper motor does not operate, replace rear wiper motor.
Disconnect terminal “2” from battery negative (–) terminal to stop rear wiper motor when marks (2) are not aligned.
Connect terminal “3” to battery negative (–) terminal.
Observe the rear wiper motor (1) turns once again then stops at a specified position as shown.
Repeat Steps 2) through 4) several times and check that the rear wiper motor stops at the specified position every time.
If check result is not as specified, rear replace wiper motor.
